entity.summary: Self-custody on-chain perpetual exchange built through Hyperliquid HIP-3, offering equity, index, currency, commodity, bond, alternative-asset, and crypto markets with order books and professional order types.
entity.notes: Current first-party trading application exposes live perpetual markets, order books, positions, portfolio controls, and leveraged order entry. First-party documentation identifies Markets by Kinetiq as available now, completely on-chain on Hyperliquid, and self-custodial.

evidence.title: Markets by Kinetiq trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes trading, order-book, portfolio, position, history, statistics, and trader surfaces for live perpetual markets.

evidence.title: Welcome to Markets
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes an available-now, fully on-chain, self-custody Hyperliquid venue for 24/7 perpetual trading with L4 order books and market, limit, stop, TWAP, and scale orders.
